label: LIVE PILOT PLAN - HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED
positioning_statement: Position Saurabh as a senior IC product leader with verified monetization, referral/rewards, AI/ML personalization, wallet-adjacent payments trust, and platform execution evidence.
recommended_headline: Lead Product Manager - Monetization, Loyalty, Wallet & AI-Personalized Growth
alternative_headline: Senior Product Manager - Monetization, Rewards & Marketplace Growth Systems
summary_architecture: Position Product OS as proof layer, not employer experience
awards: Selected awards available in canonical data
education: MBA, Indian Institute of Management Indore
B.Tech Computer Engineering, National Institute of Technology Surat

known_gaps.gap: Direct eBay-scale marketplace loyalty production ownership is not fully proven
known_gaps.mitigation: Use verified referral/rewards, monetization, wallet-adjacent payments, and LoyaltyIQ simulation with clear labeling.

known_gaps.gap: Direct digital wallet product ownership is adjacent rather than exact
known_gaps.mitigation: Use Mahindra Comviva payments reliability and platform trust evidence; avoid claiming wallet ownership as production experience.

known_gaps.gap: 10+ years TPM requirement is close but may need recruiter interpretation
known_gaps.mitigation: Use 9+ years plus technical product depth; do not inflate years.

warnings: Do not imply direct eBay, marketplace, or wallet production ownership.
LoyaltyIQ must be labeled as portfolio simulation.
Do not inflate 9+ years to the JD's 10+ year requirement.
human_review_decisions: Confirm whether to foreground LoyaltyIQ or keep it compact.
Confirm final contact details before DOCX/PDF export.
Review 10+ years requirement wording without inflating experience.
